overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking through a sunlit urban Los Santos neighborhood. The character travels from a residential sidewalk past All Saints Hospital, crosses intersections with trolley tracks, and continues through a mix of commercial and industrial areas with the downtown skyline visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential sidewalk with medical buildings and palm trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past parked vehicles and palm trees with the downtown skyline ahead

notable_agents.action: green vintage sedan parked on the side of the road

entered.detail: large medical building with prominent signage
tall palm trees lining the street
black metal fence running along the sidewalk
wooden utility poles with overhead power lines
cluster of modern glass skyscrapers visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sunlit concrete sidewalk in a residential area, passing the All Saints General Hospital on the left. A green vintage sedan is parked by the curb, and palm trees line the street. The downtown skyline is visible in the distance ahead.

events.description: character steps onto crosswalk and begins crossing the multi-lane intersection
finishes crossing and continues walking along the road embedded with trolley tracks

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection and continuing along the road with trolley tracks, navigating between traffic

notable_agents.action: silver sedan driving through the intersection
pedestrian crossing the street ahead of the character

entered.detail: red octagonal stop sign at the corner
metal trolley tracks embedded in the road surface

segments.scene_description: The character approaches and crosses a wide urban intersection, moving from sidewalk to asphalt crosswalk. A stop sign appears on the left as trolley tracks become visible in the road. Traffic including a silver sedan moves through the intersection while the downtown skyline grows larger ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane commercial road with trolley tracks

events.description: character turns right at the intersection onto a narrower sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking along the road between traffic lanes, passing commercial buildings before turning right at the intersection

notable_agents.action: silver sedan driving along the road parallel to the character

entered.detail: single-story commercial building with gas station canopy

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking along the wide asphalt road with embedded trolley tracks, passing a gas station on the right. Several vehicles drive past as the character approaches the next intersection and turns right onto a different sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk next to industrial warehouse buildings

agents.ego_description: walking along the narrow sidewalk next to an industrial building, approaching a traffic light

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in brown jacket walking in the opposite direction along the sidewalk

entered.detail: large beige industrial warehouse with metal roll-up doors
red and white for rent sign attached to the building wall
large grey electrical utility boxes on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: After turning right, the character walks along a narrower concrete sidewalk next to an industrial warehouse building with a For Rent sign. The palm trees and trolley tracks are no longer visible, while the downtown skyline shifts to the left side of the frame. A pedestrian in a brown jacket walks in the opposite direction.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sunlit urban neighborhood that transitions from a residential hospital zone into a stark industrial area. It begins on a concrete sidewalk passing All Saints General Hospital and a parked green vintage sedan, with palm trees lining the street and the downtown skyline visible in the distance. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts to a wide intersection where the camera crosses asphalt marked by trolley tracks and passing traffic. The path then continues along the road past a gas station before turning right, causing the open street to give way to a narrower sidewalk. Finally, the environment transforms into an industrial setting beside a warehouse with a For Rent sign, as the skyline shifts to the left and a pedestrian in a brown jacket passes by.
